channel.title: projects on rohanrd.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in projects on rohanrd.xyz

item.title: Part 1: Creating Todo Application With Htmx
item.description: This is beginner’s introduction to creating a web based todo application. If you program on daily basis this post is not for you. But before you go I want you to know that I am implementing this application in htmx. If you haven’t heard of htmx, read along. You may skip the sections depending on your expertise Our todo application will be very basic one. It will support functionalities like

item.title: Monitoring Solar Power Over WiFi
item.description: Measuring solar panel output with Arduino and ESP8266 and viewing it on Grafana dashboard with InfluxDB hosted on Raspberry PI
